name: Remix: DnD GM Dashboard
description: GM Dashboard is a full-stack Dungeons & Dragons 5e web application designed for Game Masters to run tabletop sessions and manage campaigns seamlessly. It provides real-time combat and initiative tracking, character health and condition monitoring, custom NPC statblock libraries, and multi-campaign data storage backed directly by Google Sheets. Additionally, it features an integrated ambient soundboard engine with customizable audio presets and sound effects to create an immersive table atmosphere.
